overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in a spacesuit walking across a dark industrial spaceport dock toward a massive landed spaceship. The environment features atmospheric haze, artificial lighting, and massive industrial structures.

agents.ego_description: character in spacesuit walking steadily along the curved dock platform toward the distant hangar

entered.detail: curved concrete and metal platform with illuminated edge strips
enormous landed spaceship visible through atmospheric haze in the distance
tall industrial pillars and overhead framework supporting the dock
faint lights visible in the far background beyond the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, curved industrial dock platform at night. The massive capital ship is visible in the far distance through atmospheric haze, while large support gantries rise on the right. The environment is artificially lit and completely deserted.

events.description: passing the modular checkpoint building and entering the main hangar bay

agents.ego_description: walking past the checkpoint structure and entering the illuminated hangar interior

entered.detail: small white modular structure with illuminated interior and ramp entrance
stacked industrial crates and containers near the hangar entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a small modular checkpoint building on the right. As the character enters the main hangar, the massive capital ship becomes more prominent in the center of view, and cargo containers appear stacked near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: main hangar bay with capital ship

events.description: entering the brightly lit area beneath the capital ship's floodlights

agents.ego_description: walking toward the massive ship, approaching its landing gear and hull

entered.detail: massive hydraulic landing struts and support structures of the capital ship

segments.scene_description: Inside the vast hangar, the character approaches the massive capital ship which now dominates the frame. The ship's landing gear and detailed hull become visible as the character walks beneath its floodlights. The modular checkpoint building falls behind as the character moves deeper into the hangar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate industrial dock toward the overwhelming scale of a landed capital ship. It begins with the character walking along a wide, curved platform at night, where the ship is merely a distant silhouette obscured by atmospheric haze and towering support gantries. As the character passes a small modular checkpoint building, the scene opens into a vast hangar where the ship becomes more prominent and stacks of cargo containers line the entrance. The perspective then shifts deeper into the hangar, with the checkpoint falling behind as the massive vessel begins to dominate the entire frame. Finally, the camera moves directly beneath the ship's floodlights, revealing the intricate details of the hull and the immense scale of its landing gear.
